name: Daily standup
description: A daily engineering standup. The FACILITATOR (speaker ME) runs the room; whispers coach the facilitator. Designed to fire every agent in the Standup suite and to show action-item capture, a silent decision fact, per-speaker memory, Phase-1 -> Phase-2 event coordination, cooldown gating that also suppresses the Phase-2 hop, and a silence-triggered timebox nudge.
user_context: You are the facilitator running the team's daily standup. The copilot whispers private coaching to you about action items, decisions, balance, and time.

steps.speaker: ME
steps.text: Morning everyone -- let's keep this tight. Sam, kick us off: what did you finish yesterday?
steps.note: Facilitator opens. No keyword/event/silence triggers -- nothing should fire. Timebox Monitor is skipped (trigger_type_mismatch: it only wakes on silence).

steps.speaker: SAM
steps.text: Yesterday I closed out the caching bug and reviewed two PRs. Today I'm on the search indexer.
steps.note: Pure status update, no commitment language. Participation Tracker silently does sam_turns -> 1 in memory (watch the Memory panel). No whisper.

steps.speaker: SAM
steps.text: Oh -- I'll take the production deploy this afternoon too, that's on me.
steps.note: FIRST action item. Expect: Action Item Detector pushes to the `action_items` queue and emits `action_item_logged`; Assignment Confirmer fires in PHASE 2 (one-hop coordination). sam_turns -> 2.

steps.speaker: PRIYA
steps.text: Can you review my authentication PR today? I'd like to ship it before the weekend.
steps.note: Another clear action item ('can you ...') only 8s after the last one. Action Item Detector is on a 12s cooldown -> it is GATED (see 'skipped: cooldown'). Because it never runs, NO event is emitted, so Assignment Confirmer ALSO stays silent in Phase 2. Lesson: a cooldown on the Phase-1 emitter suppresses the Phase-2 hop too. priya_turns -> 1.

steps.speaker: DEV
steps.text: I'll handle the schema migration so it's ready for the deploy.
steps.note: Action item 20s after the last detector run -> cooldown clear, Action Item Detector fires again (queue push + event), and Assignment Confirmer fires in Phase 2 once more. dev_turns -> 1.

steps.speaker: SAM
steps.text: On storage we decided to go with Postgres over Mongo -- that's the final call.
steps.note: A DECISION, no action item. Decision Tracker writes a `decision` fact SILENTLY (watch the Facts panel) -- no whisper. sam_turns -> 3.

steps.speaker: ME
steps.text: Good. Priya, anything blocking you besides that review?
steps.note: Facilitator prompt, no triggers. Quiet turn.

steps.speaker: SAM
steps.text: Also the search indexer needs a config flag flipped in staging, I'm looking at that.
steps.note: Sam talking again -- more status, no commitment verb. sam_turns -> 4. Still no imbalance whisper yet (it is gated to min_turn 9).

steps.speaker: SAM
steps.text: And let me also take the metrics dashboard rebuild while I'm in there.
steps.note: Turn 9. TWO things fire. Participation Tracker's first rule (speaker SAM + min_turn 9) now matches -> WARNING to balance the floor, plus sam_turns -> 5. Separately this is an action item ('let me ... take'); the detector's 12s cooldown is long clear (last run t=42), so it fires too -> queue push + event -> Assignment Confirmer in Phase 2. A busy turn: Phase-1 whisper + Phase-2 whisper + memory write.

steps.speaker: ME
steps.text: Okay, that's a lot landing on Sam. Anyone else have updates before we close?
steps.note: Facilitator reacts. Quiet turn -- no commitment/decision language, no trigger. Sets up the stall.

18s of dead air -- the room has stalled and we are over time. Timebox Monitor (silence mode, empty `when`) FIRES with a warning to wrap. Every turn_based agent is skipped (trigger_type_mismatch). Contrast with the Sales demo, where no silence agent existed and the silence turn fired nothing.
